list.name: mil
list.label: Military
list.query: Any : any, Military : mil, Civil : civ

list.name: flight
list.label: Flight (trail)
list.query: SELECT coalesce(callsign,'(none)') || '  ' || coalesce(registration, icao_hex) || '  ' || coalesce(icao_type,'') || '  ' || to_char(start_time,'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS __text, id AS __value FROM v_flights WHERE start_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${callsign:sqlstring} = '' OR callsign ILIKE '%' || ${callsign:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${registration:sqlstring} = '' OR registration ILIKE '%' || ${registration:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${type:sqlstring} = '' OR icao_type ILIKE '%' || ${type:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${operator:sqlstring} = '' OR operator ILIKE '%' || ${operator:sqlstring} || '%') AND ('${mil}' = 'any' OR (military AND '${mil}' = 'mil') OR (NOT military AND '${mil}' = 'civ')) ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 500

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS "flights" FROM v_flights WHERE start_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${callsign:sqlstring} = '' OR callsign ILIKE '%' || ${callsign:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${registration:sqlstring} = '' OR registration ILIKE '%' || ${registration:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${type:sqlstring} = '' OR icao_type ILIKE '%' || ${type:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${operator:sqlstring} = '' OR operator ILIKE '%' || ${operator:sqlstring} || '%') AND ('${mil}' = 'any' OR (military AND '${mil}' = 'mil') OR (NOT military AND '${mil}' = 'civ'));

SELECT count(DISTINCT icao_hex) AS "aircraft" FROM v_flights WHERE start_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${callsign:sqlstring} = '' OR callsign ILIKE '%' || ${callsign:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${registration:sqlstring} = '' OR registration ILIKE '%' || ${registration:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${type:sqlstring} = '' OR icao_type ILIKE '%' || ${type:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${operator:sqlstring} = '' OR operator ILIKE '%' || ${operator:sqlstring} || '%') AND ('${mil}' = 'any' OR (military AND '${mil}' = 'mil') OR (NOT military AND '${mil}' = 'civ'));

SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE military) AS "military" FROM v_flights WHERE start_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${callsign:sqlstring} = '' OR callsign ILIKE '%' || ${callsign:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${registration:sqlstring} = '' OR registration ILIKE '%' || ${registration:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${type:sqlstring} = '' OR icao_type ILIKE '%' || ${type:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${operator:sqlstring} = '' OR operator ILIKE '%' || ${operator:sqlstring} || '%') AND ('${mil}' = 'any' OR (military AND '${mil}' = 'mil') OR (NOT military AND '${mil}' = 'civ'));

panels.title: Search results  (click a callsign to plot its trail)

targets.rawSql: SELECT start_time, callsign, registration, icao_type, operator, military, max_alt, duration, id FROM v_flights WHERE start_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${callsign:sqlstring} = '' OR callsign ILIKE '%' || ${callsign:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${registration:sqlstring} = '' OR registration ILIKE '%' || ${registration:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${type:sqlstring} = '' OR icao_type ILIKE '%' || ${type:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${operator:sqlstring} = '' OR operator ILIKE '%' || ${operator:sqlstring} || '%') AND ('${mil}' = 'any' OR (military AND '${mil}' = 'mil') OR (NOT military AND '${mil}' = 'civ')) ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1000;
SELECT time, lat AS latitude, lon AS longitude, alt_baro FROM positions WHERE flight_id = $flight ORDER BY time;

SELECT operator, count(*) AS flights FROM v_flights WHERE start_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND operator IS NOT NULL AND (${callsign:sqlstring} = '' OR callsign ILIKE '%' || ${callsign:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${registration:sqlstring} = '' OR registration ILIKE '%' || ${registration:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${type:sqlstring} = '' OR icao_type ILIKE '%' || ${type:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${operator:sqlstring} = '' OR operator ILIKE '%' || ${operator:sqlstring} || '%') AND ('${mil}' = 'any' OR (military AND '${mil}' = 'mil') OR (NOT military AND '${mil}' = 'civ')) GROUP BY operator ORDER BY flights DESC LIMIT 30;
